name: mind_change_integration
notes: Owner reverses a platform assumption mid-integration-offer: after the readiness ask resolves into the Shopify offer, the owner says they're actually on Amazon, not Shopify. The manager must give an honest capability answer (Amazon is not a wired connector today — VT-465 roster-expansion gap) and must NOT fabricate an Amazon flow or claim a connection was made. Setup: `setup --onboarded --flow ready_asked` then `script <tenant> mind_change_integration.json`.

steps.note: Resolves the readiness ask into the easiest integration offer (Shopify).

steps.message: actually I don't use Shopify, I sell on Amazon
steps.note: Mind-change away from the offered platform. Expect an honest answer about Amazon support (not fabricated) and no re-ask of the correction just given.
